title: WOLDSTONE: Enchanted Legacy
description: A modpack for those tired of empty worlds. Here, under every stone lies a dungeon, beyond every hill a new story. The adventure begins.
body:
🌟 ABOUT THE MODPACK:
WOLDSTONE: Enchanted Legacy is a massive Minecraft modification that transforms the vanilla world into a living canvas for exploration and combat. Every chunk hides a story: from ruins of ancient civilizations to wandering village traders. The pack is perfectly balanced between challenge and immersion, offering both adrenaline-fueled boss fights and cozy crafting and building moments.

⚔️ KEY FEATURES:
A Living World:
Complete overhaul of structures — from YUNG's Better Dungeons to wandering village traders and mysterious wastelands in the style of STRAYED FATES.

Weapons & Magic:
An arsenal from Simply Swords, YDM's Weapon Master, and spells from Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks. Fight with elemental attacks or trust your blade — the choice is yours.

Deep Immersion:
Atmospheric sounds, 3D creature models, player animations, and tactile interfaces make every moment unique.

Endless Exploration:
New biomes, underground labyrinths, sea treasures, and secret temples — over 50 mods expanding the world.

Smart Gameplay:
Smarter farmers, intelligent inventory sorting, realistic sleep, and advanced NPCs.

Optimized for Any System:
Sodium, Lithium, and EntityCulling ensure smooth FPS even on mid-range PCs.

🔧 TECHNICAL DETAILS:
Minecraft Version: 1.21.1

Loader: NeoForge

Number of Mods: 120+ (content, optimization, interface)

Recommended RAM: 8-10 GB

Shader Support: Iris included

🎮 WHO WILL ENJOY IT:
Explorers who want every new chunk to surprise them.

Warriors craving epic battles with unique enemies.

Builders who appreciate detailed decorative blocks.

Optimizers unwilling to sacrifice FPS for beauty.

⚠️ IMPORTANT:
The pack has been tested for stability, but FPS drops may occur when using shaders.

10 GB of RAM is recommended.

Use headphones for full immersion — the sound design has been reworked.
